question: Burning fossil fuels creates a hole in the ozone ________. Stop the cycle of destruction!
Close factories that produce ________ waste now!
Protect ________ species and stop habitat loss!
Choose the correct form: 'Insects are ________ because they do not have a backbone.'
Which of these correctly describes the function of Future Perfect?
choices: An action in progress at a specific future time
An action that will be completed before a specific future time
correct_answer: An action that will be completed before a specific future time

question: Choose the correct option: 'By tomorrow, we ________ the project.' (start)
Read: 'The planet belongs to all living things: protect ________ species.'
Choose: 'In 2030, ________ you ________ here for a whole year?' (live)
He ________ the car from Aqaba. (not, drive) — negative Future Perfect Continuous.
Choose the correct option: 'I ________ all the work by next Saturday.' (complete, promise)
Choose: 'I ________ a full day.' (play — Future Perfect Continuous)
Which word means 'a thin flat body part that fish use to swim'?
A mammal is ________.
choices: an animal that lays eggs and lives in water
a warm-blooded animal that feeds its young with milk
correct_answer: a warm-blooded animal that feeds its young with milk

question: A reptile is ________.
Read: 'The aye-aye is the world's largest nocturnal primate.' What does 'nocturnal' mean?
Choose the correct speaking phrase: 'I ________ between the first idea and the second.'
choices: can't make up my mind about

question: 'You're ________ on!' means 'You are exactly correct!'
Which phrase is used to disagree politely while acknowledging a point?
choices: That's what I was going to say!
It looks as if we agree.

question: Choose: 'I ________ getting a new laptop.' (thinking about, not decided yet)
Choose the correct option: 'Students ________ arrive at 7 p.m.' (official instruction)
Read: 'I am writing to draw your attention to a pressing problem.' The word 'pressing' means ________.
In the email, Farid suggests creating a plastic-free aisle where customers could use ________.
Read: 'Around a third of consumers base their buying decisions on ethical practices.' This means ________.
Which word completes this formal sentence? 'It is ________ that we all take immediate action to prevent this.'
In compound nouns, when the first word is an adjective, the stress is on the ________.
The word 'industrial' in 'industrial waste' is an ________.
Which signposting phrase introduces what the speaker is going to talk about?
choices: I'm going to be talking about...
correct_answer: I'm going to be talking about...

question: A rhetorical question is asked to ________.
choices: get a factual answer from the audience
make a point, not get an answer
correct_answer: make a point, not get an answer

question: Read: 'Global warming is certain to lead to more water shortages.' What does 'lead to' mean here?
Which sentence shows a Future Continuous for a routine event?
choices: By next year I will have saved enough money.
She will be visiting her family at the weekend.
They are about to announce the results.
correct_answer: She will be visiting her family at the weekend.

question: Choose the correct answer: 'Driverless cars ________ reduce the number of road accidents.' (almost certainly)
In the 'Future's Terrifying' text, what will most people be in 30 years' time?
Read: 'Such cars are already a reality and are going to become more common in the next few years.' What kind of prediction is this?
Choose the correct option: 'I hope I ________ so much money by 40 that I won't need to work.'
Which phrase means 'as a result'?
Which of these is a cause-and-effect phrase where the RESULT comes after the phrase?
Read: 'No one will be living in this way within a few decades.' Which future form is used?
Choose the correct answer: 'By six o'clock, they ________ for 24 hours non-stop.'
Which word describes something pleasant to hold, like a soft toy?
Read: 'This time next week, you will be giving your presentation about climate change.' This Future Continuous expresses ________.
choices: an action in progress at a specific future time
correct_answer: an action in progress at a specific future time
